---
title: "VI_ma3"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-04-19"
---

```{r}

library(cmdstanr)
library(bayesplot)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(posterior)


source("source/data_sources_and_dependencies.R")

diff_y_scaled <- diff(data_scaled$MSPUS)


train_data <- list(
  N = length(diff_y_scaled),
  y = diff_y_scaled
)


ma3_mod <- cmdstan_model("source/ma3.stan")


ma3_vi <- ma3_mod$variational(
  data           = train_data,
  seed           = 2026,
  algorithm      = "fullrank",
  iter           = 50000,
  tol_rel_obj    = 0.001,
  draws          = 10000,
  output_samples = 10000,
  elbo_samples   = 500,
  grad_samples   = 5
)


params_of_interest <- c("mu", "theta[1]", "theta[2]", "theta[3]", "sigma")

vi_summary <- posterior::as_draws_df(ma3_vi$draws()) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(any_of(params_of_interest)) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(variable) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean   = mean(value),
    median = median(value),
    sd     = sd(value),
    mad    = mad(value),
    q5     = quantile(value, 0.05),
    q95    = quantile(value, 0.95),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  as.data.frame()

cat("\n## VI Diagnostics\n")
cat("### Summary\n")
print(vi_summary)


vi_draws <- ma3_vi$draws(variables = params_of_interest, format = "draws_matrix")

mcmc_dens(vi_draws) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "VI Posterior Approximation - MA(3) Parameters")

```
